systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast May 12 DPS not yet sent at run time (typically arrives ~7:38 AM PT). May 11 DPS arrived yesterday 7:38 AM PT but Gmail MCP get_thread returns no parseable body — Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor% require manual check in Toast app. (2) Sling May 13 daily report received at 7:01 AM PT: 7 scheduled employees, 0 off, 8 shifts, 0 uncovered, 37.24 hours, 0 OT. Staff: Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook), Tony Rincon (Bartender), Katharine Brown (Busser + Server), Andrew Turner (Bartender), Noel Nunez (Chef), Gabriel Lopez galindo (Server), James Hernadez (Busser). (3) Reviews backlog: 6 unanswered. Deimos Somied 5★ (Google, May 10, now 3 days old) top priority. Lisa O'Brien now 32 days old. (4) Google Ads May 12 live scrape: $24.44 spend, 96 clicks, 5,682 impressions, 1.69% CTR, ~$0.25 CPC, 0 conversions, target CPA $25.06. Local store visits PMax limited by budget; Oldest SB Brewery on Tap paused. (5) Yelp last 30d: 56.1k ad impressions (88% ad share of 63.8k), 786 page visits from ads (75% of 1k), 185 leads from ads (79% of 233 total), 701 ad clicks. Billing period (May 1-12) spend $345.90, avg CPC $1.13, avg CPL $3.93. No customer inquiry in 24h. (6) TripAdvisor: no new email in 24h — no ad performance report. (7) Reservations: 0 today (Wed May 13), 0 tomorrow (Thu May 14). Next big party: Stephen McCandlish Fri May 15 (3 guests). (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
